news.headline: Africom Commander Says Continent at 'Crossroads' of Global Commerce, Security
news.summary: Air Force Gen. Dagvin R.M. Anderson, commander of U.S. Africa Command, told Congress that as Africa ascends on the world stage, it faces a precarious situation due to bad actors operating throughout the region.

news.headline: Centcom Commander Says Epic Fury Crippled Iran, Enhanced Military Partnerships in Region
news.summary: Since the launch of Operation Epic Fury, American forces in the U.S. Central Command area of operations crippled Iran's military and its ability to project power, according to War Department leaders.

news.headline: Hundreds of illegal motorbikes bulldozed in New York City crime crackdown
news.summary: A moped had been used in the deadly stray-bullet shooting of a 7-month-old in Brooklyn last month, officials said.

news.headline: Air Force Reserve Wing Assists in Downed Aircraft Rescue off Florida Coast
news.summary: Air Force Reserve airmen assigned to the 920th Rescue Wing assisted in the rescue of 11 survivors from a downed civilian aircraft in the Atlantic Ocean about 80 miles east of Melbourne, Fla.

news.headline: Italians praise Catherine as they turn out for final day of trip
news.summary: The Princess of Wales shone in front of large crowds in Reggio Emilia on the final day of her tour.
